translations.### 今日主要重點 — 文字內容識別分類＋ **自己訓練模型**\n\n: ### Today's Key Points — Text Content Recognition and Classification + **Training Your Own Model**
translations.### 嚐鮮 iOS 12 CoreML — 使用機器學習自動預測文章分類，連模: ### Try iOS 12 CoreML — Use Machine Learning to Automatically Predict Article Categories, and Train the Model Yourself!
translations.**「依照你過往的經驗去預測未來同樣事情的結果」**\n\n: **"Predicting the outcome of the same event based on your past experience"**
translations.**訓練工具：** [BlankSpace007/TextClassiferPl: **Training Tool:** [BlankSpace007/TextClassiferPlayground](https://github.com/BlankSpace007/TextClassiferPlayground){:target="_blank"} (The official release only provides a **GUI training tool for images**; for text, you need to write your own. This is a third-party tool provided by an expert online)
translations.*p.s 由於圖片辨識我還沒想到能訓練它做什麼，所以就沒去研究了；有興趣的朋友可: *p.s Since I haven't figured out what to train image recognition for, I haven't studied it; interested friends can check [this article](https://www.jianshu.com/p/28ed4eff68d1){:target="_blank"}, the official GUI training tool for images is very convenient!!*
translations.- At the bottom of Apple's [Machine Lear:
- At the bottom of Apple's [Machine Learning official website](https://developer.apple.com/machine-learning/build-run-models/){:target="_blank"}, under Download Core ML Models, you can download models pre-trained by Apple (mainly for learning or testing purposes).

- **Train Your Own Model Using Tools 🏆**
translations.- Find pre-trained models online and con: - Find pre-trained models online and convert them to CoreML format
translations.- Image Recognition **🏆**\n\n- **Text Co:
- Image Recognition **🏆**

- **Text Content Recognition and Classification 🏆**

- Text Segmentation

- Text Language Detection

- Named Entity Recognition
translations.1. Can it support further training?\n\n2:
1. Can it support further training?

2. Can the mlmodel file be converted to other platforms?

3. Can you train models on iOS?
translations.1. First, perform word segmentation on t:
1. First, perform word segmentation on the input sentence (e.g., "我想知道婚禮需要準備什麼" => "我想", "知道", "婚禮", "需要", "準備", "什麼"), then determine its category and carry out a series of machine learning computations.

2. Group the training data, for example: 80% is used for training and the other 20% is used for testing and validation
translations.> **\"Predicting the outcome of the same: > **"Predicting the outcome of the same event based on your past experience"**
translations.> For example: When I eat an egg pancake: > For example: When I eat an egg pancake, I add ketchup. After buying it a few times, the breakfast shop owner remembers and asks, "Handsome, ketchup?" I answer, "Yes" — the owner predicts correctly; if I answer, "No, because it's radish cake + egg pancake" — the owner remembers and adjusts the question next time in the same situation.
translations.> Input data: Egg pancake, cheese egg pa: > Input data: Egg pancake, cheese egg pancake, egg pancake + radish cake, radish cake, egg
translations.> Model: The Landlady's Memory and Judgm: > Model: The Landlady's Memory and Judgment
translations.> Output data: Add ketchup / Do not add: > Output data: Add ketchup / Do not add ketchup
translations.[Awesome-CoreML-Models](https://github.c: [Awesome-CoreML-Models](https://github.com/likedan/Awesome-CoreML-Models){:target="_blank"} This GitHub project collects many pre-trained models from others.
translations.下載好訓練工具後，點擊 TextClassifer.playground 打開: After downloading the training tool, click TextClassifer.playground to open the Playground
translations.以上三點，目前查到的資料是都不行。\n\n: Regarding the above three points, the information found so far indicates none of them work.
translations.例如：我吃蛋餅要加番茄醬，買過幾次後早餐店老闆娘就會記得，「帥哥，加番茄醬？」我: For example: When I eat an egg pancake, I add ketchup. After buying it a few times, the breakfast shop owner remembers and asks, "Handsome, ketchup?" I answer, "Yes" — the owner predicts correctly; if I answer, "No, because it's radish cake + egg pancake" — the owner remembers and adjusts the question next time in the same situation.
translations.先將輸入的語句做斷詞(我想知道婚禮需要準備什麼=>我想,知道,婚禮,需要,準備,: First, perform word segmentation on the input sentence (e.g., "我想知道婚禮需要準備什麼" => "我想", "知道", "婚禮", "需要", "準備", "什麼"), then determine its category and carry out a series of machine learning computations.
translations.其實我對機器學習的認知，也是在純粹知道概念理論，但沒實際深入了解過，如有錯誤請大: Actually, my understanding of machine learning is mostly theoretical, and I haven't explored it in depth. Please kindly correct me if there are any mistakes.
translations.到此你的模型就已經訓練好囉！是不是很容易\n\n: Your model is now trained! Isn't it easy?
translations.到這邊已經完成大部分的工作，接下來只要把模型檔加入iOS 專案中，寫個幾行程式就: Up to this point, most of the work is done. Next, just add the model file to the iOS project and write a few lines of code.
translations.可以將mlmodel模型檔轉換到其他平台？\n: Can the mlmodel file be converted to other platforms?
translations.填寫基本訊息後按「保存」\n\n: After filling in the basic information, press "Save"
translations.如果你只是聽過「機器學習」這個名詞而不清楚他的意思的話，這邊用一句話簡單說明：\: If you have only heard the term "machine learning" but don't know what it means, here is a simple explanation in one sentence:
translations.實際應用：垃圾信件判別、標籤產生、分類預測\n\n: Practical Applications: Spam Detection, Tag Generation, Classification Prediction
translations.將JSON檔案拉入GUI工具\n\n: Import the JSON file into the GUI tool
translations.將模型檔案(*.mlmodel) 拖曳/加入專案之中\n\n: Drag and drop the model file (*.mlmodel) into the project
translations.將訓練資料分組，例如: 80% 是拿來訓練另外20%是拿來測試驗證\n: Group the training data, for example: 80% is used for training and the other 20% is used for testing and validation
translations.就是這麼簡單，完成人生中第一個機器學習項目；其中背景如何運作還有很長的路可以學習: It's that simple to complete your first machine learning project in life; there is still a long way to go to understand how the background works. I hope this project can inspire everyone!
translations.我拿去訓練資料約才100筆，目前預測命中率約35%，主要為實驗性質而已。\n\n: I used about 100 training samples, and the current prediction accuracy is around 35%. This is mainly for experimental purposes.
translations.打開下方Console查看訓練進度，看到「測試正確率」這行代表已完成模型訓練\n: Open the Console below to check the training progress. Seeing the line "Test Accuracy" means the model training is complete.
translations.打開剛下載的JSON檔案，只留下中間DATA結構裡的內容\n\n: Open the downloaded JSON file and keep only the content inside the DATA structure.
translations.探索CoreML 2.0，如何轉換或訓練模型及將其應用在實際產品上\n\n: Exploring CoreML 2.0: How to Convert or Train Models and Apply Them in Real Products
translations.接續 [上一篇](../9a9aa892f9a9/) 針對在 iOS上使用機器學: Continuing from the [previous article](../9a9aa892f9a9/) on machine learning research on iOS, this article officially dives into using CoreML.
translations.提到這就要順便拜🛐一下蘋果大神，把機器學習產品化，只要知道基本概念就能操作，不用: Speaking of this, I have to pay tribute 🛐 to the Apple gods. They have productized machine learning so that you only need to know the basics to use it, without requiring extensive knowledge. This lowers the entry barrier. It was only after implementing this example myself that I truly felt a tangible connection to machine learning, which sparked my great interest in this field.
translations.斷詞請參考 [在 iOS App 中進行自然語言處理：初探 NSLinguist: For word segmentation, please refer to [Natural Language Processing in iOS Apps: Exploring NSLinguisticTagger](https://www.appcoda.com.tw/nslinguistictagger/){:target="_blank"}
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.模型轉換可參考 [官網](https://developer.apple.com: Model conversion can refer to the [official website](https://developer.apple.com/machine-learning/build-run-models/){:target="_blank"} or online resources.
translations.模型：老闆娘的記憶跟判斷\n\n: Model: The Landlady's Memory and Judgment
translations.準備好要拿來訓練的資料，這裡以用Phpmyadmin(Mysql) 匯出訓練資料: Prepare the data for training. Here, export the training data using Phpmyadmin (Mysql).
translations.目前我將其應用在實務APP上，做文章發文時預測他的分類\n\n: Currently, I apply it in a practical app to predict the category when posting an article.
translations.第一步，最重要的當然是前面所提到的「模型」，模型從哪來呢？\n\n: The first step, and the most important, is of course the "model" mentioned earlier. Where does the model come from?
translations.網路找別人訓練好的模型並轉成CoreML的格式\n: Find pre-trained models online and convert them to CoreML format
translations.能再iOS上訓練模型？\n: Can you train models on iOS?
translations.蘋果 [Machine Learning官網](https://develope: At the bottom of Apple's [Machine Learning official website](https://developer.apple.com/machine-learning/build-run-models/){:target="_blank"}, under Download Core ML Models, you can download models pre-trained by Apple (mainly for learning or testing purposes).
translations.講白話就是，我們給機器「文字內容」跟「分類」訓練電腦對未來的資料做分類．例如：「: In simple terms, we provide the machine with "text content" and "categories" to train the computer to classify future data. For example: "Click to see the latest offers!" and "Get $1000 shopping credit now" => "Advertisement"; "Alan sent you a message" and "Your account is about to expire" => "Important".
translations.資料太多就要考驗考驗你的電腦處理能力。\n\n: When there's too much data, it's time to test your computer's processing power.
translations.資料結構如上圖，支援.json,.csv檔\n\n: The data structure is as shown above, supporting .json and .csv files.
translations.輸入的資料：蛋餅、起司蛋餅、蛋餅+蘿蔔糕、蘿蔔糕、蛋\n\n: Input data: Egg pancake, cheese egg pancake, egg pancake + radish cake, radish cake, egg
translations.輸出的資料：要加番茄醬/不加番茄醬\n\n: Output data: Add ketchup / Do not add ketchup
translations.首先簡述一下歷史，蘋果在2017年發布了CoreML(包含上篇文章介紹的Visi: First, a brief history: Apple released the CoreML machine learning framework (including Vision introduced in the previous article) in 2017. In 2018, they followed up with CoreML 2.0, which not only improved [performance](https://www.appcoda.com.tw/core-ml-2/){:target="_blank"} but also supported **customized CoreML models**.
translations.點擊紅匡執行->點擊綠匡切換View顯示\n\n: Click the red box to execute -> Click the green box to switch View display
